description.p: Solarxy is a cross-platform 3D model viewer and validator built in Rust with wgpu. It loads OBJ, STL, PLY, and glTF/GLB models and renders them with real-time PBR shading (Cook-Torrance, IBL, SSAO, bloom).

ul.li: Real-time PBR rendering with HDRI image-based lighting
Inspection modes: shaded, material ID, UV map, texel density, depth
Material overrides (clay, chrome, silhouette) for shape evaluation
Split viewport with independent or linked cameras
Validation overlay: degenerate triangles, missing UVs, normal mismatches
Companion CLI (solarxy-cli) for scripted analysis and CI integration

description.p: Packaging rearchitecture: GUI binary now ships as a true Windows-subsystem app (no console flicker on Start Menu launch), Linux GUI moves to Flatpak (this build), CLI splits into a separate solarxy-cli binary distributable via Homebrew tap, and macOS adds a Homebrew Cask path for one-step install with automatic Gatekeeper bypass.
